summary: Comprehensive testing of P2P Exchange trade management features completed. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly. Fixed 2 bugs during testing.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Trade confirm endpoint only accepted 'pending' status, not 'paid' status
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed condition from `trade['status'] != 'pending'` to `trade['status'] not in ['pending', 'paid']`

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Trade messages endpoint returned MongoDB ObjectId causing serialization error
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed endpoint to accept MessageCreate body and return dict without _id field

passed_tests: Trader dashboard shows balance, commission, trades count
Trader trades list shows active and completed trades with correct statuses (pending, paid, completed, cancelled, disputed)
Trader can click 'Открыть сделку' button to navigate to trade detail page
Trade detail page shows trade info (amount, status, timer, requisites)
Trade detail page has chat functionality with message input
Test shop page at /shop loads correctly with products and deposit options
Test shop creates payment links successfully (after merchant activation)
PayPage shows payment info with merchant name and amount
PayPage trader selection shows available traders with rates
PayPage payment step shows trader's requisites (card number, holder name)
PayPage shows trader conditions in highlighted section
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed trade confirm endpoint to accept 'paid' status
/app/backend/server.py - Fixed trade messages endpoint to properly serialize response

success_rate.backend: 100% (51 tests passed - 41 from test_p2p_exchange.py + 10 from test_trade_management.py)

seed_data_creation: Fixed trader document to add missing 'accepted_merchant_types' field. Activated test_shop_merchant for payment link testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All trade management features working correctly. TraderTradePage.js fully implemented with chat, trade details, confirm/cancel buttons. PayPage shows requisites correctly. Test shop at /shop creates payment links. Backend endpoints for confirm, cancel, dispute all working. Two bugs were fixed during testing: (1) confirm endpoint now accepts 'paid' status, (2) trade messages endpoint properly serializes response without MongoDB ObjectId.
